text: I added recent_events and expire from the front, but I have a bad feeling the set and list can drift.
Good catch. I tested id a1 at t=0 and t=301, and the second one is still skipped. The old tuple left the list, but the id is still in the set.
Right, when I pop an expired tuple I also need to remove that id from seen_ids. Otherwise the membership state is stale.
Fix that. Still don't change the output contract yet.
